title: Cozy Chicken Stir-Fry
description: A simple and comforting stir-fry dish made with chicken and savory vegetables.
instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken and cook until browned, about 5-6 minutes.
Add the bell peppers and broccoli and cook until the vegetables are tender-crisp, about 3-4 minutes.
In a small bowl, whisk together the stir-fry sauce and soy sauce.
Pour the sauce over the chicken and vegetables, and stir to coat.
Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer for 2-3 minutes.
Garnish with chopped green onions and serve hot.
Serve immediately, garnished with additional green onions if desired.
